traces.prompt: Scaffold the static-export dashboard shell and wire the sidebar navigation.
traces.response_text: Created the AppShell, Sidebar, and the eight route stubs. The export builds clean and every nav item resolves. Next I will flesh out the Memory and Activity pages against the demo fixtures.

traces.prompt: Plan the v0.7 dashboard milestone and assign the first tasks.
traces.response_text: Broke the milestone into six page builds and ordered them by user impact. Assigned the dashboard shell to the Engineer and the export research to the Researcher.

traces.prompt: Run the nightly export job and verify the bundle.
traces.response_text: The verification step failed: the static export produced a route that 404s when trailing slashes are disabled.
traces.error_message: ExportVerificationError: route /traces returned 404 with trailing slash off

traces.prompt: Compare static-export options for the dashboard bundle.
traces.response_text: Recommend the Next.js static export with output: export. It produces plain files the FastAPI runtime can mount at the root, works offline, and keeps the marketing demo identical to the local build.

traces.prompt: Refactor the status color map into a single source of truth.
traces.response_text: Consolidated every status color into lib/status-colors.ts. Badges, dots, and rings now resolve from one map, and unknown statuses fall back gracefully.

traces.prompt: Summarize the changelog for the next release.
traces.response_text: The next release adds the full dashboard surface, a static export path, and the demo-mode fixture fallback. No breaking changes to the API contract.

trc_8f21a0.prompt: Draft the task list for the dashboard milestone.
trc_8f21a0.response_text: Memory, Activity, Settings, About, Traces, Costs. Ordered by how often an operator will open each page.

trc_8f21a0.prompt: Assign the dashboard shell task to the best-suited agent.
trc_8f21a0.response_text: Assigned to the Engineer. The shell is mostly component plumbing and a build verification loop.

trc_b71f22.prompt: Verify that a static export can be mounted under a path prefix.
trc_b71f22.response_text: Confirmed. With trailingSlash enabled the export serves cleanly from a sub-path or the root.
